title: Vulkan++++
description: A optimization modpack based on vk0.4.4 engine (currently in early-alpha versions)
body: Vulkan++++/V++++ adds some optimization mods like vk0.4.4/vulkan mod and more and i reccomand for you to use this on a much newer CPU and GPU or it can strugle to even load minecraft propely because instead of the game being based on OpenGL (its very very very very very very very very very very very very very very OLD) it uses Vulkan :D (also extremely optimized) its a good modpack with less mods that other modpacks!!!! i really really reccomand this if ur pc is kinda not really new but kinda new because most old systems dont support Vulkan they only support OpenGL :D have fun and enjoy the modpack :D
